segments.nethackrc:
OPTIONS=name:Touristo,role:Tourist,race:human,gender:male,align:neutral
OPTIONS=playmode:explore
OPTIONS=!autopickup,!tutorial,pushweapon,showexp,time,color,lit_corridor
OPTIONS=disclose:yi ya yv yg yc yo
OPTIONS=suppress_alert:3.3.1
OPTIONS=msg_window:reversed
OPTIONS=symset:DECgraphics

steps.screen:
[17CIt is written in the Book of The Lady:

[21CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[21Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[21CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[21Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[21Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[21CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[17CYour goddess The Lady seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[17Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[17CYou, a newly trained Rambler, have been heralded
[17Cfrom birth as the instrument of The Lady.  You are destined
[17Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[17Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[17Cof us all:  Go bravely with The Lady!
[17C--More--




Touristo the Rambler[11CSt:13 Dx:10 Co:12 In:12 Wi:11 Ch:17 Neutral
Dlvl:1 $:61 HP:10(10) Pw:2(2) AC:0 Xp:1/0 T:1

Aloha Touristo, welcome to NetHack!  You are a neutral male human Tourist.
--More--
